title: CozyUI+

# CozyUI+

### Modifies the User Interface into a neat and subtle high-definition style, covering all the vanilla UI elements as well as many useful client mods.
### GameVersion ≥1.20
***

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/xwO9VO8a21c" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

***

###    Title: CozyUI+
   
###    Author: 零雾〇五 Fogg05
   
● This pack is based on:

○ Fluent Emoji：https://github.com/microsoft/fluentui-emoji

○ NotoSans：https://github.com/notofonts/noto-cjk

***

### ● Covered mods

| Mod Name | Home Page Link | - |
|:------:|:------:|:------:|
OptiGUI | [🔗 Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/optigui) | ⭐ Recommended
Apple Skin | [🔗 Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) | 🔄 Optional
Detail Armor Bar | [🔗 Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/detail-armor-bar) | 🔄 Optional
Litematica | [🔗 Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica) | 🔄 Optional

Replay Mod | [🔗 Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/replaymod) | 🔄 Optional

Dynamic Crosshair | [🔗 Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamiccrosshair) | 🔄 Optional
Jade | [🔗 Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade) | 🔄 Optional

***

### ● Recipes in the brewing stand

All the recipes are drawn on the brewing stand interface to help everyone memorize.

***

### ● OptiGUI MOD

Various colored shulker boxes, droppers, dispensers, and ender chests can be distinguished by the background color.

***

### ● Emoji+ & MCsans+

Modify the fonts to high-definition NotoSans and FluentEmoji.

https://github.com/Fogg05/Emoji-Plus

https://github.com/Fogg05/MCsans-Plus

***

### ● Experience bar RGB

Inventory selection boxes and experience bars feature RGB cycling with a very slow gradient, where the colors are continually adjusted to ensure a leisurely and soothing pace.

***

### ● Button Animations

Some buttons will be animated in game versions ≥1.21
